entries.title: LinkedIn Company Tech Stack Scanner
entries.notes: Scrapes LinkedIn company pages and job listings to extract technology mentions, enriching CRM records automatically. Lightweight DOM parsing—no backend needed. Surfaces before-meeting intel in a sidepanel.
entries.pain: Sales reps waste hours manually researching prospect technology stacks before calls.

entries.title: PR Review Fatigue Analyzer
entries.notes: Analyzes GitHub PR diff size, complexity, and comment density to flag 'review overload' risk. Suggests splitting or scheduling reviews. Trivial Chrome extension with GitHub API calls and local scoring model.
entries.pain: Senior engineers avoid reviewing large PRs due to fatigue, slowing team velocity.

entries.title: Notion Database Schema Viewer
entries.notes: Parses Notion page DOM to extract database schema (properties, types, relations) and renders a clean sidepanel map. Uses Notion's undocumented DOM structure—no API key needed for read-only views.
entries.pain: Teams lose track of Notion database properties across pages, causing schema drift and broken automations.

entries.title: Sales Prospect Website Change Monitor
entries.notes: Takes periodic lightweight screenshots or DOM diffs of prospect URLs and alerts on changes. Stores diffs locally; alerts via browser notification. Targets small sales teams lacking full competitor intel tools.
entries.pain: AEs miss critical website changes on prospects that signal buying intent.

entries.title: Browser API Usage Heatmap
entries.notes: Instruments fetch, localStorage, IndexedDB, Service Worker, and Permissions API calls, rendering a live heatmap in the devtools panel. Builds a usage profile per origin. Useful for deprecation planning.
entries.pain: Frontend devs can't see which browser APIs are actually executing in production across their user base.

entries.title: Email Warmup Campaign Tracker
entries.notes: Connects to warmup provider APIs (if available) or scrapes dashboard pages to surface daily warmup stats (inbox placement, reply rate) directly in Gmail. Consolidates fragmented warmup data into one view.
entries.pain: Salespeople using email warmup services lose visibility into campaign progress and deliverability signals.

entries.title: CSS Variable Change Detector
entries.notes: Watches all CSS custom property mutations on a page and logs changes with timestamps and sources (inline, external, JS-set). Useful for debugging design token bleed in large frontend codebases.
entries.pain: Design system changes break components silently because there's no live CSS custom property change tracker.

entries.title: Meeting Engagement Sentiment Tracker
entries.notes: Analyzes Google Meet participant video/mic activity patterns and chat message sentiment (simple keyword scoring) during calls to generate an 'engagement pulse' score. Writes summary to a Google Sheet row post-call.
entries.pain: Sales managers lack real-time signals on meeting engagement without reviewing full recordings.

entries.title: GraphQL Query Complexity Analyzer
entries.notes: Intercepts GraphQL requests, estimates query complexity (depth + breadth scoring), and shows a cost badge per request. Flags expensive operations before they hit production. Integrates with Apollo and Relay.
entries.pain: GraphQL APIs get hammered by deeply nested queries that are hard to cost-profile in development.

entries.title: Lead Scoring Territory Heatmap
entries.notes: Parses CRM lead data (location, industry, company size) and renders a territory heatmap in a sidepanel overlay on the CRM page. Suggests reassignments based on balanced territory coverage. Works with Salesforce and HubSpot.
entries.pain: Sales managers assign leads by gut feel instead of geographic or firmographic clustering.

entries.title: LocalStorage Migration Assistant
entries.notes: Detects localStorage, sessionStorage, and IndexedDB usage per origin, surfaces a migration export UI, and lets users sync selected stores to a self-hosted JSON backup via a simple webhook or file download.
entries.pain: Users lose important browser data when switching devices or clearing storage.
